en-accessibility--docs.name: Docs
en-accessibility--docs.title: en/accessibility
en-accessibility--docs.content:
﻿--- title: English/Accessibility --- # Accessibility Chaos UI targets **WCAG 2.1 Level AA** compliance. Every component is designed, built, and tested with screen readers, keyboard navigation, and contrast in mind. ## Standards - **WCAG 2.1 AA** as the baseline - **WAI-ARIA 1.2** patterns for complex widgets - **Keyboard parity** — every interactive element is reachable and operable without a mouse - **RTL support** — components are direction-agnostic and flip correctly under `dir="rtl"` ## Color & Contrast | Element | Minimum ratio | Target | |---------|---------------|--------| | Body text | 4.5:1 | AAA 7:1 where possible | | Large text (≥18.66px bold / 24px regular) | 3:1 | AA | | UI components & graphical objects | 3:1 | AA | | Focus indicators | 3:1 against adjacent colors | AA | Use semantic tokens — they are pre-tuned for contrast in both light and dark modes: ```tsx // ✅ Use semantic tokens (contrast-checked)

Body

Secondary

// ❌ Avoid raw color utilities for text

Body

``` ## Keyboard Navigation Every interactive element must: 1. Be **reachable** via Tab in logical reading order 2. Have a **visible focus ring** (`focus-visible:ring-ring/50`) 3. Be **activatable** via Enter (and Space for buttons/checkboxes) 4. Trap focus inside modal dialogs and return it to the trigger on close 5. Expose **escape hatches** — `Esc` closes overlays Pattern for focus-visible styling: ```tsx className="focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:outline-none" ``` ## ARIA Patterns Chaos UI uses `@base-ui/react` for primitives, which provide correct ARIA roles and attributes out of the box. Don't override them unless you have a specific reason. | Component | Role | Key attributes | |-----------|------|----------------| | `Dialog` | `dialog` | `aria-modal`, `aria-labelledby`, `aria-describedby` | | `Sheet` | `dialog` | same as Dialog | | `Popover` | `dialog` | `aria-expanded` on trigger | | `Tooltip` | `tooltip` | `role="tooltip"` on content | | `Tabs` | `tablist` / `tab` / `tabpanel` | `aria-selected`, `aria-controls` | | `Menu` | `menu` / `menuitem` | `aria-expanded`, `aria-haspopup` | | `Switch` | `switch` | `aria-checked` | | `RadioGroup` | `radiogroup` / `radio` | `aria-checked` | ## Forms Form fields must always have an accessible label. Use `

en-component-guidelines--docs.name: Docs
en-component-guidelines--docs.title: en/component-guidelines
en-component-guidelines--docs.content:
﻿---
title: English/Component Guidelines
---

# Component Guidelines

Standards and best practices for building Chaos UI components.

## Architecture

### Component Layers

```
components/
├── ui/           # Base UI components (atomic)
├── business/     # Business domain components
└── layout/       # Page-level layouts
```

### Layer Rules

1. **UI Components** (`components/ui/`)
   - Base, reusable components
   - No business logic
   - Highly customizable

2. **Business Components** (`components/business/`)
   - Built on top of UI components
   - Contains domain-specific logic
   - Examples: DataTable, FormField, StatusTag

3. **Layout Components** (`components/layout/`)
   - Page-level layouts
   - Compose business and UI components

## Naming Conventions

| Type | Convention | Example |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Files | `kebab-case.tsx` | `status-tag.tsx` |
| Components | `PascalCase` | `StatusTag` |
| Props Types | `ComponentNameProps` | `StatusTagProps` |
| CSS Variables | `--kebab-case` | `--brand-500` |
| Hooks | `use` prefix | `use-mobile.ts` |
| Constants | `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` | `ORDER_STATUSES` |

## Component Structure

### Basic Component Template

```tsx
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

// 1. Variant definitions
const componentVariants = cva(
  "base-classes",
  {
    variants: { ... },
    defaultVariants: { ... },
  }
)

// 2. Props interface
interface ComponentNameProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    VariantProps<typeof componentVariants> {
  // Custom props
}

// 3. Component implementation
function ComponentName({ ... }: ComponentNameProps) {
  return <div className={cn(componentVariants({ ... }))} />
}

// 4. Exports
export { ComponentName, componentVariants }
export type { ComponentNameProps }
```

## Design Token Usage

Always use semantic tokens, never hardcoded colors:

```tsx
// ✅ Correct
<div className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground" />

// ❌ Incorrect
<div className="bg-blue-500 text-white" />
```

### Status Color Pattern

```tsx
// For badges and tags
className="bg-success/15 text-success"
className="bg-warning/15 text-warning"
className="bg-destructive/10 text-destructive"
```

## State Management

### Focus States

```tsx
"focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50"
```

### Disabled States

```tsx
"disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
```

### Validation States

```tsx
"aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20"
```

## Dark Mode

All components must support dark mode:

```tsx
// Background colors
"dark:bg-input/30"  // Default
"dark:bg-input/50"  // Hover

// Border colors
"dark:border-input"

// Invalid states
"dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50"
```

## Data Attributes

Every component should use data attributes for state and variant:

```tsx
// Slot identification
<div data-slot="component-name" />

// Size variant
<div data-size={size} />

// Visual variant
<div data-variant={variant} />

// State
<div data-state="open" />
```

## Accessibility

1. All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
2. Use `aria-label` for icon-only buttons
3. Use `aria-describedby` for form field descriptions
4. Use semantic HTML elements
5. Maintain 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text
6. Use `sr-only` for screen reader context

## Performance

1. Use `"use client"` ONLY when needed
2. Prefer Server Components by default
3. Use `React.memo()` for expensive renders
4. Use `useCallback` for event handlers passed as props
5. Use `next/dynamic` for heavy components

## Testing

1. Every component should have a Story
2. Include all variants in stories
3. Use `argTypes` for complete Props documentation
4. Tag with `autodocs` for automatic documentation
5. Add `tags: ['a11y']` for accessibility testing

## Anti-Patterns

Avoid these patterns:

- ❌ Raw hex colors in className
- ❌ Inline styles for static values
- ❌ `any` type
- ❌ Modifying UI components directly
- ❌ `console.log` in production
- ❌ Hardcoded strings (use constants)
- ❌ Missing TypeScript types
- ❌ Using `@apply` when a Tailwind class exists
- ❌ Importing from relative paths (use `@/` alias)

en-design-tokens--docs.name: Docs
en-design-tokens--docs.title: en/design-tokens
en-design-tokens--docs.content:
﻿---
title: English/Design Tokens
---

# Design Tokens

Chaos UI uses CSS custom properties for all design tokens, enabling consistent theming and easy customization.

## Color Tokens

### Semantic Colors

| Token | Usage | CSS Variable |
|-------|-------|--------------|
| `background` | Page background | `--background` |
| `foreground` | Default text | `--foreground` |
| `primary` | Primary actions | `--primary` |
| `primary-foreground` | Text on primary | `--primary-foreground` |
| `secondary` | Secondary actions | `--secondary` |
| `secondary-foreground` | Text on secondary | `--secondary-foreground` |
| `muted` | Subtle backgrounds | `--muted` |
| `muted-foreground` | Subtle text | `--muted-foreground` |
| `accent` | Hover states | `--accent` |
| `accent-foreground` | Text on accent | `--accent-foreground` |
| `destructive` | Destructive actions | `--destructive` |
| `destructive-foreground` | Text on destructive | `--destructive-foreground` |

### Status Colors

| Token | Usage | CSS Variable |
|-------|-------|--------------|
| `success` | Success states | `--success` |
| `success-foreground` | Text on success | `--success-foreground` |
| `warning` | Warning states | `--warning` |
| `warning-foreground` | Text on warning | `--warning-foreground` |
| `info` | Info states | `--info` |
| `info-foreground` | Text on info | `--info-foreground` |

### Brand Colors

A professional blue palette from 50 to 950:

| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `brand-50` | Lightest tint |
| `brand-100` | Very light |
| `brand-200` | Light |
| `brand-300` | Light medium |
| `brand-400` | Medium light |
| `brand-500` | Base brand |
| `brand-600` | Medium dark |
| `brand-700` | Dark medium |
| `brand-800` | Dark |
| `brand-900` | Very dark |
| `brand-950` | Darkest shade |

### Border & Input

| Token | Usage | CSS Variable |
|-------|-------|--------------|
| `border` | Default borders | `--border` |
| `input` | Input borders | `--input` |
| `ring` | Focus rings | `--ring` |
| `surface` | Elevated surfaces | `--surface` |
| `surface-foreground` | Text on surface | `--surface-foreground` |

## Spacing Scale

Chaos UI uses Tailwind's default spacing scale:

| Class | Size | Pixels |
|-------|------|--------|
| `p-1` | 1 | 4px |
| `p-2` | 2 | 8px |
| `p-3` | 3 | 12px |
| `p-4` | 4 | 16px |
| `p-6` | 6 | 24px |
| `p-8` | 8 | 32px |

## Border Radius

| Class | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `rounded-sm` | `radius * 0.6` | Small elements |
| `rounded-md` | `radius * 0.8` | Inputs, selects |
| `rounded-lg` | `radius` | Cards, dialogs |
| `rounded-xl` | `radius * 1.4` | Modals |
| `rounded-2xl` | `radius * 1.8` | Large surfaces |
| `rounded-full` | 9999px | Pills, avatars |

## Typography

| Class | Size | Line Height |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `text-xs` | 0.75rem | 1rem |
| `text-sm` | 0.875rem | 1.25rem |
| `text-base` | 1rem | 1.5rem |
| `text-lg` | 1.125rem | 1.75rem |
| `text-xl` | 1.25rem | 1.75rem |
| `text-2xl` | 1.5rem | 2rem |
| `text-3xl` | 1.875rem | 2.25rem |

### Font Weights

| Class | Weight |
|-------|--------|
| `font-normal` | 400 |
| `font-medium` | 500 |
| `font-semibold` | 600 |
| `font-bold` | 700 |

## Shadows

| Class | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `shadow-xs` | Subtle elevation |
| `shadow-sm` | Small elevation |
| `shadow-md` | Medium elevation |
| `shadow-lg` | Large elevation |
| `shadow-xl` | Extra large |
| `shadow-2xl` | Maximum elevation |

## Component Sizes

Chaos UI components use a consistent sizing system:

| Size | Height | Usage |
|------|--------|-------|
| `xs` | 24px (h-6) | Compact UI |
| `sm` | 28px (h-7) | Dense layouts |
| `default` | 32px (h-8) | Standard UI |
| `lg` | 36px (h-9) | Prominent UI |

) } ``` ## Component Anatomy Every Chaos UI component follows a consistent pattern: ```tsx import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' // 1. Import the component import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' // 2. Use it with TypeScript props function MyComponent() { return ( ) } ``` ## Styling Chaos UI uses Tailwind CSS 4 with CSS custom properties. All components accept a `className` prop for custom styling: ```tsx ``` Use the `cn()` utility to merge class names: ```tsx import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

# Chaos UI Documentation

Welcome to the Chaos UI documentation.

**🌐 Language / 语言**

- 🇨🇳 [中文文档 (Chinese)](/docs/zh-home--docs) — Chinese documentation
- 🇺🇸 English (you are here)

## Contents

- [Introduction](/docs/en-introduction--docs) — Overview of Chaos UI
- [Getting Started](/docs/en-getting-started--docs) — Set up Chaos UI in your project
- [Installation](/docs/en-installation--docs) — Install the npm package
- [Component Guidelines](/docs/en-component-guidelines--docs) — Standards for building components
- [Design Tokens](/docs/en-design-tokens--docs) — Colors, spacing, typography
- [Theming](/docs/en-theming--docs) — CSS variables, dark mode, custom themes
- [Internationalization](/docs/en-internationalization--docs) — i18n setup and namespaces
- [Accessibility](/docs/en-accessibility--docs) — A11y standards and best practices

en-installation--docs.name: Docs
en-installation--docs.title: en/installation
en-installation--docs.content:
--- title: English/Installation description: How to install Chaos UI in your project --- # Installation Chaos UI is available as an npm package: `@qxyfoods/chaos-ui`. ## Requirements - React >= 19.0.0 - Node.js >= 22.0.0 - Tailwind CSS 4 (recommended) ## Install **npm** ```bash npm install @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` **yarn** ```bash yarn add @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` **pnpm** ```bash pnpm add @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` ## Peer Dependencies Install the required peer dependencies: ```bash npm install react@^19 react-dom@^19 ``` For Next.js projects: ```bash npm install next@^16 next-themes@^0.4 ``` ## Import Styles Import the CSS file in your app entry point: ```tsx import "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/styles.css"; ``` ## Tailwind Configuration (Optional) If you use Tailwind CSS, extend your config to include Chaos UI's design tokens: ```ts // tailwind.config.ts import type { Config } from "tailwindcss"; export default { content: [ "./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}", "./node_modules/@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/dist/**/*.{js,cjs}", ], } satisfies Config; ``` ## Usage ```tsx import { Button, Input, Dialog } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui"; function App() { return (
); } ``` ## Subpath Imports For tree-shaking, use subpath imports: ```tsx // Import only UI primitives import { Button } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/ui"; // Import only hooks import { useDebounce } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/hooks"; // Import only lib utilities import { cn } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/lib"; // Import only business components import { DataTable } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/business"; ``` ## TypeScript Chaos UI is built with TypeScript and ships with full type definitions. No additional `@types` packages needed. ```tsx import type { ButtonProps } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/ui"; ```

en-internationalization--docs.name: Docs
en-internationalization--docs.title: en/internationalization
en-internationalization--docs.content:
﻿--- title: English/Internationalization --- # Internationalization Chaos UI ships with a built-in i18n layer powered by [i18next](https://www.i18next.com/) and [react-i18next](https://react.i18next.com/). Two locales are bundled: `zh-CN` (default) and `en-US`. ## Configuration The configuration lives at `lib/i18n/config.ts`: ```ts i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({ lng: "zh-CN", fallbackLng: "zh-CN", defaultNS: "common", interpolation: { escapeValue: false }, returnObjects: false, }); ``` - **Default language**: `zh-CN` - **Fallback language**: `zh-CN` - **Default namespace**: `common` ## Namespaces Translations are split into 13 namespaces, each scoped to a feature area: | Namespace | Purpose | |-----------|---------| | `common` | Generic UI strings (save, cancel, confirm, etc.) | | `ui` | Component-level labels (button, input, dialog) | | `error` | Error messages and validation feedback | | `data` | DataTable, lists, search, sort, filter | | `chart` | Chart titles, axis labels, legends | | `cookie` | Cookie consent banner | | `language` | Language picker labels | | `marketing` | Marketing copy and CTAs | | `mobile` | Mobile-specific copy | | `navigation` | Menu, sidebar, breadcrumb | | `notification` | Toast and alert messages | | `tour` | Product tour steps | | `transfer` | Transfer / shuttle component | | `upload` | File upload states | ## File Layout ``` lib/i18n/ ├── config.ts # i18next init ├── provider.tsx # React provider ├── index.ts # re-exports └── resources/ ├── zh/ # Chinese (zh-CN) │ ├── common.json │ ├── ui.json │ └── ... └── en/ # English (en-US) ├── common.json ├── ui.json └── ... ``` ## Provider Wrap your app with `I18nProvider` (in `lib/i18n/provider.tsx`): ```tsx import { I18nProvider } from "@/lib/i18n" export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return ( {children} ) } ``` ## Usage in Components ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; function MyComponent() { const { t } = useTranslation("common"); return ; } ``` With multiple namespaces: ```tsx const { t } = useTranslation(["common", "ui"]); return

{t("common:actions.save")}

; ``` ## Switching Languages Change the active language at runtime: ```ts import i18n from "@/lib/i18n"; i18n.changeLanguage("en-US"); ``` Or via a hook: ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; const { i18n } = useTranslation(); ``` ## Adding a New Namespace 1. Create `lib/i18n/resources/zh/.json` and `lib/i18n/resources/en/.json` with the same key tree. 2. Import both files in `lib/i18n/config.ts` and add to the `resources` object. 3. Use it: `useTranslation("")`. ```ts // lib/i18n/config.ts import marketingZh from "./resources/zh/marketing.json"; import marketingEn from "./resources/en/marketing.json"; const resources = { "zh-CN": { ..., marketing: marketingZh }, "en-US": { ..., marketing: marketingEn }, }; ``` ## Adding a New Language 1. Create a folder `lib/i18n/resources//` and copy every namespace file in. 2. Translate every key. 3. Register in `config.ts`: ```ts import ja from "./resources/ja/common.json"; const resources = { "zh-CN": { ... }, "en-US": { ... }, "ja-JP": { common: ja }, }; ``` 4. Update `lng` and `fallbackLng` as needed. ## Best Practices 1. **Never hardcode user-facing strings** in components — always go through `t()` 2. **Use semantic keys**, not the literal text: `t("actions.save")` not `t("Save")` 3. **Keep namespaces focused** — don't dump everything into `common` 4. **Interpolate values** with named placeholders: `t("welcome", { name: "Alex" })` 5. **Test with a missing key** to ensure `fallbackLng` resolves correctly 6. **Keep `zh-CN` and `en-US` keys in sync** — same JSON tree, different values ## Related - [Accessibility](/docs/en-accessibility--docs) — locale and direction - [Component Guidelines](/docs/en-component-guidelines--docs) — i18n rules

en-introduction--docs.name: Docs
en-introduction--docs.title: en/introduction
en-introduction--docs.content:
﻿---
title: English/Introduction
---

# Chaos UI Design System

Enterprise-grade component design system built with React 19, TypeScript 5.9, and Tailwind CSS 4.

## Overview

Chaos UI is a comprehensive component library designed for building modern web applications. It provides:

- **60+ UI Components** - Production-ready base components
- **14+ Business Components** - Domain-specific components
- **3+ Layout Components** - Page-level layouts
- **Full TypeScript Support** - Strict type safety
- **Dark Mode Ready** - Built-in dark mode support
- **AI-Friendly Documentation** - Optimized for LLM consumption

## Tech Stack

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| React 19 | UI framework |
| TypeScript 5.9 | Type safety |
| Tailwind CSS 4 | Styling |
| @base-ui/react | Base UI primitives |
| shadcn/ui | Component patterns |
| Lucide React | Icons |
| Storybook 10 | Documentation |

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start Storybook
npm run dev

# Build Storybook for production
npm run build-storybook
```

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── intro/           # Introduction & guides
├── components/      # UI component stories
├── business/        # Business component stories
├── layout/          # Layout component stories
└── utils/           # Documentation utilities
```

## For AI Assistants

This Storybook is designed to be AI-friendly:

- **llms.txt** - Structured text for LLM consumption
- **MDX Documentation** - Rich component documentation
- **TypeScript Types** - Complete type information
- **JSDoc Comments** - Inline code documentation
- **MCP Integration** - Model Context Protocol support

## Component Categories

### Form Controls
Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio Group, Switch, Date Picker, Color Picker

### Data Display
Card, Badge, Avatar, Table, DataTable, AdvancedDataTable, Tag, StatusTag

### Feedback
Alert, Toast, Skeleton, Progress, Empty State, Spinner

### Navigation
Tabs, Breadcrumb, Pagination, Navigation Menu, Sidebar, Stepper

### Overlays
Dialog, Sheet, Drawer, Popover, Tooltip, Hover Card, Dropdown Menu

### Layout
Grid, Stack, Container, Splitter, Form Grid, Form Section

### Advanced
Browse Input, User Browse, Department Browse, Tree View, Tree Select, Form List, Virtual List, Virtual Table, KPI Panel

## Design Principles

1. **Consistency** - Unified design tokens across all components
2. **Accessibility** - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
3. **Customizable** - Theme-able via CSS variables
4. **Performant** - Optimized for production
5. **Type-Safe** - Full TypeScript support

## License

Internal use only.

zh-accessibility--docs.content:
﻿--- title: 中文/无障碍 --- # 无障碍 Chaos UI 以 **WCAG 2.1 AA 级**合规为目标。每个组件在设计、构建和测试阶段均考虑了屏幕阅读器、键盘导航和对比度。 ## 标准 - **WCAG 2.1 AA** 作为基线 - **WAI-ARIA 1.2** 模式用于复杂组件 - **键盘对等** — 每个交互元素都可在不使用鼠标的情况下到达和操作 - **RTL 支持** — 组件与方向无关，在 `dir="rtl"` 下正确翻转 ## 颜色与对比度 | 元素 | 最低比率 | 目标 | |------|----------|------| | 正文文字 | 4.5:1 | 尽可能达到 AAA 7:1 | | 大号文字（≥18.66px 粗体/24px 常规） | 3:1 | AA | | UI 组件与图形对象 | 3:1 | AA | | 焦点指示器 | 相邻颜色 3:1 | AA | 使用语义令牌 — 它们已在明暗模式下预调对比度： ```tsx // ✅ 使用语义令牌（对比度已验证）

正文

次要

// ❌ 避免使用原始颜色工具类显示文字

正文

``` ## 键盘导航 每个交互元素必须： 1. 可通过 Tab **到达**，遵循逻辑阅读顺序 2. 具有**可见焦点环**（`focus-visible:ring-ring/50`） 3. 可通过 Enter **激活**（按钮/复选框还需 Space） 4. 模态对话框内捕获焦点，关闭时返回触发元素 5. 提供**逃生键** — `Esc` 关闭弹层 焦点可见样式模式： ```tsx className="focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:outline-none" ``` ## ARIA 模式 Chaos UI 使用 `@base-ui/react` 作为原语，开箱即用提供正确的 ARIA 角色和属性。除非有特定原因，否则不要覆盖。 | 组件 | 角色 | 关键属性 | |------|------|----------| | `Dialog` | `dialog` | `aria-modal`、`aria-labelledby`、`aria-describedby` | | `Sheet` | `dialog` | 同 Dialog | | `Popover` | `dialog` | 触发器上 `aria-expanded` | | `Tooltip` | `tooltip` | 内容 `role="tooltip"` | | `Tabs` | `tablist` / `tab` / `tabpanel` | `aria-selected`、`aria-controls` | | `Menu` | `menu` / `menuitem` | `aria-expanded`、`aria-haspopup` | | `Switch` | `switch` | `aria-checked` | | `RadioGroup` | `radiogroup` / `radio` | `aria-checked` | ## 表单 表单字段必须始终有无障碍标签。使用 `

zh-component-guidelines--docs.name: Docs
zh-component-guidelines--docs.title: zh/component-guidelines
zh-component-guidelines--docs.content:
﻿---
title: 中文/组件规范
---

# 组件规范

构建 Chaos UI 组件的标准与最佳实践。

## 架构

### 组件分层

```
components/
├── ui/           # 基础 UI 组件（原子级）
├── business/     # 业务领域组件
└── layout/       # 页面级布局
```

### 分层规则

1. **UI 组件**（`components/ui/`）
   - 基础、可复用组件
   - 不包含业务逻辑
   - 高度可定制

2. **业务组件**（`components/business/`）
   - 基于 UI 组件构建
   - 包含领域特定逻辑
   - 示例：DataTable、FormField、StatusTag

3. **布局组件**（`components/layout/`）
   - 页面级布局
   - 组合业务与 UI 组件

## 命名约定

| 类型 | 约定 | 示例 |
|------|------|------|
| 文件 | `kebab-case.tsx` | `status-tag.tsx` |
| 组件 | `PascalCase` | `StatusTag` |
| Props 类型 | `ComponentNameProps` | `StatusTagProps` |
| CSS 变量 | `--kebab-case` | `--brand-500` |
| Hooks | `use` 前缀 | `use-mobile.ts` |
| 常量 | `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` | `ORDER_STATUSES` |

## 组件结构

### 基本组件模板

```tsx
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

// 1. 变体定义
const componentVariants = cva(
  "基础类名",
  {
    variants: { ... },
    defaultVariants: { ... },
  }
)

// 2. Props 接口
interface ComponentNameProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    VariantProps<typeof componentVariants> {
  // 自定义 props
}

// 3. 组件实现
function ComponentName({ ... }: ComponentNameProps) {
  return <div className={cn(componentVariants({ ... }))} />
}

// 4. 导出
export { ComponentName, componentVariants }
export type { ComponentNameProps }
```

## 设计令牌使用

始终使用语义令牌，绝不硬编码颜色：

```tsx
// ✅ 正确
<div className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground" />

// ❌ 错误
<div className="bg-blue-500 text-white" />
```

### 状态色模式

```tsx
// 用于徽章和标签
className="bg-success/15 text-success"
className="bg-warning/15 text-warning"
className="bg-destructive/10 text-destructive"
```

## 状态管理

### 焦点状态

```tsx
"focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50"
```

### 禁用状态

```tsx
"disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
```

### 校验状态

```tsx
"aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20"
```

## 暗色模式

所有组件必须支持暗色模式：

```tsx
// 背景色
"dark:bg-input/30"  // 默认
"dark:bg-input/50"  // 悬停

// 边框色
"dark:border-input"

// 校验状态
"dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50"
```

## 数据属性

每个组件都应使用数据属性来标识状态和变体：

```tsx
// 插槽识别
<div data-slot="component-name" />

// 尺寸变体
<div data-size={size} />

// 视觉变体
<div data-variant={variant} />

// 状态
<div data-state="open" />
```

## 无障碍

1. 所有交互元素必须可键盘访问
2. 仅图标按钮使用 `aria-label`
3. 表单字段描述使用 `aria-describedby`
4. 使用语义化 HTML 元素
5. 文字保持 4.5:1 对比度
6. 屏幕阅读器上下文使用 `sr-only`

## 性能

1. 仅在必要时使用 `"use client"`
2. 默认优先使用服务端组件
3. 对开销较大的渲染使用 `React.memo()`
4. 作为 props 传递的事件处理使用 `useCallback`
5. 重量级组件使用 `next/dynamic`

## 测试

1. 每个组件都应有 Story
2. 故事中包含所有变体
3. 使用 `argTypes` 完整描述 Props
4. 标记 `autodocs` 以自动生成文档
5. 添加 `tags: ['a11y']` 进行无障碍测试

## 反模式

避免以下模式：

- ❌ className 中使用原始 hex 颜色
- ❌ 对静态值使用内联样式
- ❌ `any` 类型
- ❌ 直接修改 UI 组件
- ❌ 生产环境中的 `console.log`
- ❌ 硬编码字符串（使用常量）
- ❌ 缺失 TypeScript 类型
- ❌ 存在 Tailwind 类时使用 `@apply`
- ❌ 使用相对路径导入（用 `@/` 别名）

zh-design-tokens--docs.title: zh/design-tokens
zh-design-tokens--docs.content:
﻿---
title: 中文/设计令牌
---

# 设计令牌

Chaos UI 使用 CSS 自定义属性（CSS 变量）管理所有设计令牌，实现一致的主题化与便捷的自定义。

## 颜色令牌

### 语义色

| 令牌 | 用途 | CSS 变量 |
|------|------|----------|
| `background` | 页面背景 | `--background` |
| `foreground` | 默认文本 | `--foreground` |
| `primary` | 主要操作 | `--primary` |
| `primary-foreground` | 主要文本 | `--primary-foreground` |
| `secondary` | 次要操作 | `--secondary` |
| `secondary-foreground` | 次要文本 | `--secondary-foreground` |
| `muted` | 弱化背景 | `--muted` |
| `muted-foreground` | 弱化文本 | `--muted-foreground` |
| `accent` | 悬停状态 | `--accent` |
| `accent-foreground` | 强调文本 | `--accent-foreground` |
| `destructive` | 危险操作 | `--destructive` |
| `destructive-foreground` | 危险文本 | `--destructive-foreground` |

### 状态色

| 令牌 | 用途 | CSS 变量 |
|------|------|----------|
| `success` | 成功状态 | `--success` |
| `success-foreground` | 成功文本 | `--success-foreground` |
| `warning` | 警告状态 | `--warning` |
| `warning-foreground` | 警告文本 | `--warning-foreground` |
| `info` | 信息状态 | `--info` |
| `info-foreground` | 信息文本 | `--info-foreground` |

### 品牌色

专业蓝色色阶（50 至 950）：

| 令牌 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `brand-50` | 最浅色 |
| `brand-100` | 极浅 |
| `brand-200` | 浅色 |
| `brand-300` | 浅中 |
| `brand-400` | 中浅 |
| `brand-500` | 基准品牌色 |
| `brand-600` | 中深 |
| `brand-700` | 深中 |
| `brand-800` | 深色 |
| `brand-900` | 极深 |
| `brand-950` | 最深色 |

### 边框与输入

| 令牌 | 用途 | CSS 变量 |
|------|------|----------|
| `border` | 默认边框 | `--border` |
| `input` | 输入框边框 | `--input` |
| `ring` | 焦点环 | `--ring` |
| `surface` | 提升表面 | `--surface` |
| `surface-foreground` | 表面文本 | `--surface-foreground` |

## 间距比例

Chaos UI 使用 Tailwind 默认间距比例：

| 类名 | 值 | 像素 |
|------|----|------|
| `p-1` | 1 | 4px |
| `p-2` | 2 | 8px |
| `p-3` | 3 | 12px |
| `p-4` | 4 | 16px |
| `p-6` | 6 | 24px |
| `p-8` | 8 | 32px |

## 圆角

| 类名 | 值 | 用途 |
|------|----|------|
| `rounded-sm` | `radius * 0.6` | 小元素 |
| `rounded-md` | `radius * 0.8` | 输入框、选择器 |
| `rounded-lg` | `radius` | 卡片、对话框 |
| `rounded-xl` | `radius * 1.4` | 模态框 |
| `rounded-2xl` | `radius * 1.8` | 大面积表面 |
| `rounded-full` | 9999px | 胶囊、头像 |

## 排版

| 类名 | 大小 | 行高 |
|------|------|------|
| `text-xs` | 0.75rem | 1rem |
| `text-sm` | 0.875rem | 1.25rem |
| `text-base` | 1rem | 1.5rem |
| `text-lg` | 1.125rem | 1.75rem |
| `text-xl` | 1.25rem | 1.75rem |
| `text-2xl` | 1.5rem | 2rem |
| `text-3xl` | 1.875rem | 2.25rem |

### 字重

| 类名 | 粗细 |
|------|------|
| `font-normal` | 400 |
| `font-medium` | 500 |
| `font-semibold` | 600 |
| `font-bold` | 700 |

## 阴影

| 类名 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `shadow-xs` | 微弱提升 |
| `shadow-sm` | 轻度提升 |
| `shadow-md` | 中度提升 |
| `shadow-lg` | 较大提升 |
| `shadow-xl` | 大幅提升 |
| `shadow-2xl` | 最大提升 |

## 组件尺寸

Chaos UI 组件使用一致的尺寸体系：

| 尺寸 | 高度 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| `xs` | 24px (h-6) | 紧凑 UI |
| `sm` | 28px (h-7) | 密集布局 |
| `default` | 32px (h-8) | 标准 UI |
| `lg` | 36px (h-9) | 显著 UI |

﻿--- title: 中文/快速开始 --- # 快速开始 在项目中使用 Chaos UI 组件的快速指南。 ## 安装 ```bash npm install ``` ## 开发 ```bash # 在 6006 端口启动 Storybook 文档 npm run dev # 启动 Next.js 开发服务器 npm run app:dev # 构建生产版本 npm run build # 构建 Storybook 部署版本 npm run build-storybook # 运行代码检查 npm run lint ``` ## 基本用法 导入组件并在代码中使用： ```tsx import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' export default function Page() { return (
) } ``` ## 组件剖析 每个 Chaos UI 组件遵循一致的模式： ```tsx import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' // 1. 导入组件 import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' // 2. 使用 TypeScript 属性 function MyComponent() { return ( ) } ``` ## 样式 Chaos UI 使用 Tailwind CSS 4 与 CSS 自定义属性。所有组件接受 `className` 属性用于自定义样式： ```tsx ``` 使用 `cn()` 工具函数合并类名： ```tsx import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

title: 中文/首页
---

# Chaos UI 文档

欢迎使用 Chaos UI 文档。

**🌐 语言 / Language**

- 🇨🇳 中文（当前页面）
- 🇺🇸 [English Documentation](/docs/en-home--docs) — 英文文档

## 目录

- [简介](/docs/zh-introduction--docs) — Chaos UI 概览
- [快速开始](/docs/zh-getting-started--docs) — 在项目中搭建 Chaos UI
- [安装](/docs/zh-installation--docs) — 安装 npm 包
- [组件规范](/docs/zh-component-guidelines--docs) — 构建组件的标准与最佳实践
- [设计令牌](/docs/zh-design-tokens--docs) — 颜色、间距、排版
- [主题化](/docs/zh-theming--docs) — CSS 变量、暗色模式、自定义主题
- [国际化](/docs/zh-internationalization--docs) — i18n 配置与命名空间
- [无障碍](/docs/zh-accessibility--docs) — A11y 标准与最佳实践

zh-installation--docs.name: Docs
zh-installation--docs.title: zh/installation
zh-installation--docs.content:
--- title: 中文/安装 description: 如何在项目中安装 Chaos UI --- # 安装 Chaos UI 作为 npm 包提供：`@qxyfoods/chaos-ui`。 ## 环境要求 - React >= 19.0.0 - Node.js >= 22.0.0 - Tailwind CSS 4（推荐） ## 安装 **npm** ```bash npm install @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` **yarn** ```bash yarn add @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` **pnpm** ```bash pnpm add @qxyfoods/chaos-ui ``` ## 同伴依赖 安装必需的同伴依赖： ```bash npm install react@^19 react-dom@^19 ``` 对于 Next.js 项目： ```bash npm install next@^16 next-themes@^0.4 ``` ## 引入样式 在应用入口引入 CSS 文件： ```tsx import "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/styles.css"; ``` ## Tailwind 配置（可选） 如果使用 Tailwind CSS，请扩展配置以包含 Chaos UI 的设计令牌： ```ts // tailwind.config.ts import type { Config } from "tailwindcss"; export default { content: [ "./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}", "./node_modules/@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/dist/**/*.{js,cjs}", ], } satisfies Config; ``` ## 使用方法 ```tsx import { Button, Input, Dialog } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui"; function App() { return (
); } ``` ## 子路径导入 为支持 tree-shaking，使用子路径导入： ```tsx // 仅导入 UI 原语 import { Button } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/ui"; // 仅导入 hooks import { useDebounce } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/hooks"; // 仅导入 lib 工具 import { cn } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/lib"; // 仅导入业务组件 import { DataTable } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/business"; ``` ## TypeScript Chaos UI 使用 TypeScript 构建，自带完整类型定义，无需额外的 `@types` 包。 ```tsx import type { ButtonProps } from "@qxyfoods/chaos-ui/ui"; ```

zh-internationalization--docs.name: Docs
zh-internationalization--docs.title: zh/internationalization
zh-internationalization--docs.content:
﻿--- title: 中文/国际化 --- # 国际化 Chaos UI 内置 i18n 层，基于 [i18next](https://www.i18next.com/) 和 [react-i18next](https://react.i18next.com/)。内置两种区域设置：`zh-CN`（默认）和 `en-US`。 ## 配置 配置位于 `lib/i18n/config.ts`： ```ts i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({ lng: "zh-CN", fallbackLng: "zh-CN", defaultNS: "common", interpolation: { escapeValue: false }, returnObjects: false, }); ``` - **默认语言**：`zh-CN` - **回退语言**：`zh-CN` - **默认命名空间**：`common` ## 命名空间 翻译按 13 个命名空间划分，每个命名空间对应一个功能区域： | 命名空间 | 用途 | |----------|------| | `common` | 通用 UI 字符串（保存、取消、确认等） | | `ui` | 组件级标签（按钮、输入框、对话框） | | `error` | 错误消息与校验反馈 | | `data` | 数据表格、列表、搜索、排序、筛选 | | `chart` | 图表标题、坐标轴标签、图例 | | `cookie` | Cookie 同意横幅 | | `language` | 语言选择器标签 | | `marketing` | 营销文案与号召性用语 | | `mobile` | 移动端专用文案 | | `navigation` | 菜单、侧边栏、面包屑 | | `notification` | Toast 与通知消息 | | `tour` | 产品引导步骤 | | `transfer` | 穿梭框组件 | | `upload` | 文件上传状态 | ## 文件结构 ``` lib/i18n/ ├── config.ts # i18next 初始化 ├── provider.tsx # React Provider ├── index.ts # 重新导出 └── resources/ ├── zh/ # 中文（zh-CN） │ ├── common.json │ ├── ui.json │ └── ... └── en/ # 英文（en-US） ├── common.json ├── ui.json └── ... ``` ## Provider 使用 `I18nProvider`（位于 `lib/i18n/provider.tsx`）包裹应用： ```tsx import { I18nProvider } from "@/lib/i18n" export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return ( {children} ) } ``` ## 在组件中使用 ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; function MyComponent() { const { t } = useTranslation("common"); return ; } ``` 使用多个命名空间： ```tsx const { t } = useTranslation(["common", "ui"]); return

{t("common:actions.save")}

; ``` ## 切换语言 运行时切换活动语言： ```ts import i18n from "@/lib/i18n"; i18n.changeLanguage("en-US"); ``` 或通过 hook： ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; const { i18n } = useTranslation(); ``` ## 添加新命名空间 1. 在 `lib/i18n/resources/zh/.json` 和 `lib/i18n/resources/en/.json` 创建具有相同键树的文件。 2. 在 `lib/i18n/config.ts` 中导入两个文件并添加到 `resources` 对象。 3. 使用：`useTranslation("")`。 ```ts // lib/i18n/config.ts import marketingZh from "./resources/zh/marketing.json"; import marketingEn from "./resources/en/marketing.json"; const resources = { "zh-CN": { ..., marketing: marketingZh }, "en-US": { ..., marketing: marketingEn }, }; ``` ## 添加新语言 1. 创建文件夹 `lib/i18n/resources//` 并复制每个命名空间文件。 2. 翻译每个键。 3. 在 `config.ts` 中注册： ```ts import ja from "./resources/ja/common.json"; const resources = { "zh-CN": { ... }, "en-US": { ... }, "ja-JP": { common: ja }, }; ``` 4. 根据需要更新 `lng` 和 `fallbackLng`。 ## 最佳实践 1. **绝不硬编码面向用户的字符串** — 始终通过 `t()` 2. **使用语义化键名**，而非字面文本：`t("actions.save")` 而非 `t("保存")` 3. **保持命名空间聚焦** — 不要将所有内容放入 `common` 4. **使用命名占位符插值值**：`t("welcome", { name: "Alex" })` 5. **用缺失键测试**以确保 `fallbackLng` 正确回退 6. **保持 `zh-CN` 和 `en-US` 键一致** — 相同的 JSON 树，不同的值 ## 相关 - [无障碍](/docs/zh-accessibility--docs) — 区域与方向 - [组件规范](/docs/zh-component-guidelines--docs) — i18n 规则

zh-introduction--docs.title: zh/introduction
zh-introduction--docs.content:
﻿---
title: 中文/简介
---

# Chaos UI 设计系统

基于 React 19、TypeScript 5.9 和 Tailwind CSS 4 构建的企业级组件设计系统。

## 概览

Chaos UI 是一个为构建现代 Web 应用而设计的综合组件库，提供：

- **60+ UI 组件** — 生产就绪的基础组件
- **14+ 业务组件** — 领域专用组件
- **3+ 布局组件** — 页面级布局
- **完整 TypeScript 支持** — 严格类型安全
- **暗色模式开箱即用** — 内置暗色模式支持
- **AI 友好文档** — 针对 LLM 消费优化

## 技术栈

| 技术 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| React 19 | UI 框架 |
| TypeScript 5.9 | 类型安全 |
| Tailwind CSS 4 | 样式 |
| @base-ui/react | 基础 UI 原语 |
| shadcn/ui | 组件模式 |
| Lucide React | 图标 |
| Storybook 10 | 文档 |

## 快速开始

```bash
# 安装依赖
npm install

# 启动 Storybook
npm run dev

# 构建 Storybook 生产版本
npm run build-storybook
```

## 项目结构

```
src/
├── intro/           # 简介与指南
├── components/      # UI 组件故事
├── business/        # 业务组件故事
├── layout/          # 布局组件故事
└── utils/           # 文档工具
```

## 为 AI 助手设计

此 Storybook 专为 AI 友好而设计：

- **llms.txt** — 供 LLM 消费的结构化文本
- **MDX 文档** — 丰富的组件文档
- **TypeScript 类型** — 完整的类型信息
- **JSDoc 注释** — 内联代码文档
- **MCP 集成** — 模型上下文协议支持

## 组件分类

### 表单控件
Button、Input、Textarea、Select、Checkbox、Radio Group、Switch、Date Picker、Color Picker

### 数据展示
Card、Badge、Avatar、Table、DataTable、AdvancedDataTable、Tag、StatusTag

### 反馈
Alert、Toast、Skeleton、Progress、Empty State、Spinner

### 导航
Tabs、Breadcrumb、Pagination、Navigation Menu、Sidebar、Stepper

### 弹层
Dialog、Sheet、Drawer、Popover、Tooltip、Hover Card、Dropdown Menu

### 布局
Grid、Stack、Container、Splitter、Form Grid、Form Section

### 高级
Browse Input、User Browse、Department Browse、Tree View、Tree Select、Form List、Virtual List、Virtual Table、KPI Panel

## 设计原则

1. **一致性** — 所有组件统一的设计令牌
2. **无障碍** — 符合 WCAG 2.1 AA 标准
3. **可定制** — 通过 CSS 变量实现主题化
4. **高性能** — 针对生产环境优化
5. **类型安全** — 完整的 TypeScript 支持

## 许可证

仅供内部使用。

zh-theming--docs.name: Docs
zh-theming--docs.title: zh/theming
